comments: Add these dependencies to your package.json devDependencies

versionInfo.docx: Version 8.5.0 or higher - For DOCX file generation
versionInfo.jspdf: Version 2.5.1 or higher - For PDF generation
versionInfo.jszip: Version 3.10.1 or higher - For ZIP archive creation

usage.step1: Run: npm install docx jspdf jszip
usage.step2: Import in your component or service file
usage.step3: Use the export functions from reportExport.js
